spec.description: Rename and folder-rename items accepted in the selected time range.
spec.title: Accepted Rename Items

spec.description: TraceQL metrics query for Renamarr error spans by span name over the last 24 hours.
spec.title: Error Span Rate

spec.description: Recent traces containing an error span.
spec.title: Error Traces

spec.description: Rename and folder-rename items failed in the selected time range.
spec.title: Failed Rename Items

spec.description: Failed rename items grouped by service, operation, and configured Renamarr instance.
spec.title: Failed Rename Items by Instance

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service, job, name) (rate(renamarr_job_duration_seconds_bucket{name=~"$instance_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: p95 duration for Renamarr jobs from the OTLP histogram export.
spec.title: Job Duration p95

spec.description: Failed Renamarr jobs in the selected time range.
spec.title: Failed Jobs

spec.description: Job execution rate by service, job, and result.
spec.title: Job Run Rate

spec.description: Renamarr jobs completed in the selected time range.
spec.title: Job Runs

spec.description: Accepted and failed rename item rates by service, operation, and configured instance.
spec.title: Operation Item Rate

spec.description: TraceQL metrics query for Renamarr spans by span name over the last 24 hours.
spec.title: Span Rate

spec.description: Seconds since the latest successful Renamarr job by service, instance, and job.
spec.title: Last Success Age

spec.description: Rename operation run rate including noop, accepted, and failed outcomes.
spec.title: Operation Run Rate

spec.description: Candidate item rate by service, instance, and operation.
spec.title: Candidate Items

spec.description: Sonarr/Radarr command run rate by command and result.
spec.title: Arr Command Run Rate

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service, name, command, result) (rate(renamarr_arr_command_duration_seconds_bucket{name=~"$instance_name"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.description: 95th percentile duration for observed Sonarr/Radarr commands.
spec.title: Arr Command Duration p95

spec.description: Recent Renamarr error logs from Loki when a Loki datasource is available.
spec.title: Recent Error Logs
